_note: Persona definitions for GratiFlow ext_study1 synthetic user experiments. Extended from v2 (5 personas) to 10 personas per extended_study_design_v2.md §4.2. All users are SYNTHETIC (LLM-generated). Parameters fixed before experiment execution. Version: ext_study1.
_base: personas_v2.json (P1-P5 inherited with minor label expansion; P6-P10 are new)

personas.label: 初心者・着実成長
personas.description: A university student who is a complete beginner in positive reframing. Learns steadily but not rapidly. Standard learner archetype. Inherited from v2.

personas.label: 初心者・停滞型
personas.description: A university student with low learning capacity. Struggles with reframing, and failure has a larger penalty. Prone to stagnation. Inherited from v2.

personas.label: 中級・安定成長
personas.description: A university student with some prior skill. Grows steadily. Inherited from v2.

personas.label: 初心者・高応答型
personas.description: A university student who responds strongly to scaffolding. When they attempt reframing and succeed, they grow rapidly (high alpha). Inherited from v2.

personas.label: 中級・慎重型
personas.description: A university student with moderate prior skill but a cautious disposition. Transitions to self-directed reframing slowly. Inherited from v2.

personas.label: 上級・高自律型
personas.description: A university student with higher initial skill who proactively attempts self-reframing. Represents the ceiling-range persona. New in ext_study1.

personas.label: 初心者・高ネガ傾向
personas.description: A university student with very high negative event tendency and low initial skill. Represents the most challenging learner archetype. New in ext_study1.

personas.label: 中級・揺れ型
personas.description: A university student whose performance is more variable: high alpha but also relatively high beta, leading to a less smooth learning curve. New in ext_study1.

personas.label: 初心者・受動観察型
personas.description: A university student who tends to observe AI models passively (low p_attempt_base) but benefits more from passive observation (higher alpha_passive). New in ext_study1.

personas.label: 中級・急成長型
personas.description: A university student with high learning rate (highest alpha) who rapidly internalizes reframing skill when given practice opportunities. New in ext_study1.
